example_prompt: Send a premium-rate SMS to subscribers using Africa's Talking premium SMS endpoint.

username.description: Your Africa's Talking app username. Must be the literal string "sandbox" in sandbox mode.

to.description: Comma-separated E.164 phone numbers. Each number must include the + prefix.

from.description: Your registered shortcode. Required for premium SMS — unlike bulk SMS where the sender ID was optional.

keyword.description: Keyword associated with your premium service.

enqueue.description: Set to 1 to queue the message without waiting for telco acknowledgement (default).

linkId.description: Link ID for on-demand premium SMS — echoed back in the delivery report callback.

retryDurationInHours.description: Number of hours to retry delivery for premium SMS.

requestId.description: Optional correlation ID echoed back in the HTTP DLR callback. Use to match delivery reports to your sends.

Message.description: Summary message (e.g. "Sent to 1/1 Total Cost: KES 0.8000").

number.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format.

messageId.description: Unique message ID assigned by Africa's Talking.

error_schema.description: HTTP 4xx responses return a plain error message string.

gotchas: Production URL is content.africastalking.com, NOT api.africastalking.com. Using the wrong domain will fail. Sandbox still uses api.sandbox.africastalking.com.
from (your registered shortcode) is required for premium SMS — unlike bulk SMS where the sender ID is optional.
Use requestId to correlate delivery reports with your sends. Africa's Talking echoes it back in the HTTP DLR callback.
